attributes.description: Single cluster deep dive with health summary, resource usage & capacity, node health, and top consumers.

allColumns.label: View logs in Discover for cluster:

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created)
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC 
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC 
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC 
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory / 1073741824, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory / 1073741824, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory / 1073741824, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

attributes.description: Average node CPU usage / average allocatable CPU for this cluster.
attributes.title: CPU utilization

embeddableConfig.description: Average node CPU usage / average allocatable CPU for this cluster.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU usage across all nodes vs total cluster CPU capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs cluster capacity

query.esql:

| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set),

  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), k8s.node.name

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_disk / 1073741824, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_disk / 1073741824, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_disk / 1073741824, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

embeddableConfig.description: Total node count in this cluster. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

embeddableConfig.description: Nodes in Ready state. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE condition_ready > 0.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

embeddableConfig.description: Nodes not in Ready state. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE condition_ready <= 0.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

embeddableConfig.description: CPU utilization per node as bar chart. sum(k8s.node.cpu.usage) / sum(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) by node.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by CPU utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

embeddableConfig.description: Namespace count in this cluster. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name).

  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)

embeddableConfig.description: Total pod count in this cluster. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

embeddableConfig.description: Running pods (phase=2). COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2.
